name: @ludiars/lictor
description: Per-session sidecar for agent TUI CLIs (Claude Code, OpenAI Codex). Wraps the CLI so hooks inside the session can drive the host terminal (OSC title), inject keystrokes (slash commands, raw keys, AskUserQuestion answers), proxy filesystem reads, mediate PreToolUse permission decisions, integrate with Concordia (register / persona / chat / stat / conflicts / WS event reactor / pending-tasks / branch relay / transcript relay), and inject scoped skills (persona + repo-relevant memories + live session state) via --add-dir.
